id.description: User ID as primary key - each user has exactly one row

generated_images.description: Blockchain-like JSON array of generated images with full history

forked_images.description: Blockchain-like JSON array of forked images with version history

public_gallery.description: Array of image IDs that user has made public

last_sync.description: Last sync timestamp for conflict resolution

database.instructions: Each user has exactly one row. All image data is stored in blockchain-like JSON structures where each edit appends a new entry with full history. Use timestamps for conflict resolution between database and localStorage.
